creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please see attached patch to update devel/py-python to 1.7.0

$ git diff
diff --git devel/py-python-gitlab/Makefile devel/py-python-gitlab/Makefile
index 9ff0bb7eec1c..15045b07d85f 100644
--- devel/py-python-gitlab/Makefile
+++ devel/py-python-gitlab/Makefile
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	python-gitlab
-PORTVERSION=	1.6.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.7.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
diff --git devel/py-python-gitlab/distinfo devel/py-python-gitlab/distinfo
index 98a6e482c39d..11191cce426b 100644
--- devel/py-python-gitlab/distinfo
+++ devel/py-python-gitlab/distinfo
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1535296371
-SHA256 (python-gitlab-1.6.0.tar.gz) = 20ceb9232f9a412ce6554056a6b5039013d0755261d57b5c8ada7035773de795
-SIZE (python-gitlab-1.6.0.tar.gz) = 110201
+TIMESTAMP = 1549109885
+SHA256 (python-gitlab-1.7.0.tar.gz) = 401ef8929db4dcb5b08e0a2263a0a70599fc7e5b27615f956ac26d245802d09e
+SIZE (python-gitlab-1.7.0.tar.gz) = 110657
